media.altText: Four hikers walk across a wide golden meadow towards distant mountains

sections.subtitle: Three days on Paul Salopek's trail
sections.text: Three days on Paul Salopek's slow-travel trail — a stretch of the Jade Dragon Snow Mountain corridor we walked together for the iconic National Geographic documentary "The Forever Walk: China": remote hamlets, alpine meadows, a quiet slice of the old Tea & Horse Road. Join the guides featured in the documentary: Mr. Lukasz, Mr. He and Mr. Lu to guide you through the biodiversity and cultures of this unforgettable trail. You'll come home with a slower pulse and new, long-lasting friendships.

items.title: What's Special
items.subtitle: Paul Salopek's National Geographic trail
items.highlight: Walk the same path as Paul Salopek documented for NatGeo

items.title: Duration
items.subtitle: Three Days
items.highlight: Day 1: 9:00 AM to 8:00 PM | Day 2: Full Day | Day 3: 9:00 AM to 8:00 PM

items.title: Location
items.subtitle: Jade Dragon Snow Mountain & Wenhai
items.highlight: Jade Dragon Snow Mountain Nature Reserve | Altitudes 2,400-3,250m

items.title: Activity Level
items.subtitle: High
items.highlight: Walking: Up to 18 km per day

items.title: Forever Walk Trail
items.subtitle: Forever Walk Trail
items.text: Walk a renowned section of the "Forever Walk: China" trail, as documented by National Geographic. Immerse yourself in the very landscapes and cultural encounters that captivated the world.

items.title: Paul Salopek's Path
items.subtitle: Paul Salopek's Path
items.text: Follow a part of Pulitzer Prize winner Paul Salopek's epic global walk. Reflect on humanity and our planet as you trace his path through nature and culture of Yunnan.

items.title: Wenhai Wetlands
items.subtitle: Wenhai Wetlands
items.text: Discover the remarkable biodiversity of Wenhai Wetlands alongside a local conservationist. Learn about unique species and delicate ecosystems.

items.title: Naxi Village Stay
items.subtitle: Naxi Village Stay
items.text: Experience genuine Naxi hospitality with an overnight stay in Wenhai village. Share in local customs and connect with the warm community.

items.title: Tiger Cave
items.subtitle: Tiger Cave
items.text: Uncover the mysteries of Tiger Cave, a fascinating local geological wonder. Explore its intriguing rock formations and legends surrounding this natural site.

items.title: Minority Villages
items.subtitle: Minority Villages
items.text: Journey through charming minority villages and tranquil hamlets. Observe diverse architectural styles, local traditions, and peaceful rural life.

items.title: Wilderness Trek
items.subtitle: Jade Dragon Snow Mountain
items.text: Hike through the untouched wilderness of Jade Dragon Snow Mountain Nature Reserve with a local forest ranger. Explore pristine landscapes and experience raw nature.

items.title: Yi Village Experience
items.subtitle: Runangu Village
items.text: Immerse yourself in Yi culture with an overnight stay in Runangu village. Engage with villagers and learn about their distinct customs.

items.title: Ancient Forests
items.subtitle: Ancient Forests
items.text: Witness extraordinary biodiversity of ancient forests within Jade Dragon Snow Mountain. Discover plant and animal life in Yunnan's primeval forests.

items.title: Bonfire Evening
items.subtitle: Bonfire Evening
items.text: Gather around a cozy bonfire with local villagers. Share stories and warmth under the starry Yunnan sky, forging memorable bonds.

items.title: Panoramic Views
items.subtitle: Jade Dragon Snow Mountain
items.text: Stand in awe of the majestic Jade Dragon Snow Mountain. Capture breathtaking panoramic views and feel the powerful presence of this iconic wonder.

image.altText: Jade Dragon Snow Mountain panoramic views

items.title: Expert Guides
items.subtitle: Conservation Professionals
items.text: Journey alongside renowned conservation experts deeply rooted in Yunnan's landscapes. Their passion turns the journey into an enriching, unforgettable adventure.

activities: Depart from your Lijiang hotel and hike to Wenhai Wetlands. Follow the exact path of 'Forever Walk: China' trail as documented by National Geographic.
Explore biodiversity of Wenhai Wetlands alongside local conservationists. Learn about unique species and delicate ecosystems.
Arrive at your overnight village stay in Wenhai. Share authentic dinner with local Naxi families and gather around a cozy bonfire.
After breakfast, set out to uncover the mysteries of Tiger Cave.
After a lunch in village fish farm, embark on a trek through charming minority villages and tranquil hamlets. Observe diverse architectural styles and local traditions.
Arrive in Runangu Yi minority village for your second overnight stay. Immerse yourself in Yi culture and engage with welcoming villagers.

Venture into the wilderness of Jade Dragon Snow Mountain Nature Reserve with a local forest ranger. Trek through ancient primeval forests filled with abundant species of flora, fauna and fungi. Arrive in yak meadow with spectacular panoramic views of Jade Dragon Snow Mountain.

Continue the ascent to a mountain top shrouded in local legends, enjoy the stories and views on the highest peaks of Jade Dragon Snow Mountain. Begin your scenic descent to Runangu village and return back to Lijiang by car.

Celebrate your journey with a farewell dinner, sharing stories and reflections on your transformative experience along the Forever Walk trail. After the dinner, arrive back at your hotel with memories of walking in the footsteps of Paul Salopek.

contactNote.text: For groups of 1 person or more than 6 people

included.text: English-Speaking Coordinator/Guide (Lukasz Madrzynski), Local Guides, Traditional Local Food (Breakfasts, Lunches, Dinners), Accommodation (2 Nights), Private Transportation, Outdoor Travel Insurance.
included.notIncluded: Personal Expenses (Souvenirs, etc.), Voluntary Gratuities for the Coordinators/Guides
included.meetingPoint: Pickup: 9:00 AM at your Lijiang hotel | Return: Approximately 8:00 PM to your Lijiang hotel

sections.subtitle: Click on a question to reveal the answer

items.question: What should I bring?
items.answer: We recommend comfortable hiking boots with good ankle support, moisture-wicking clothing layers, sun protection, a daypack, water bottle, and your camera.

items.question: Is this suitable for beginners?
items.answer: This tour requires a higher fitness level as you will walk up to 18 km per day at altitudes of 2,400-3,250m. Previous hiking experience is recommended.

items.question: What's the cancellation policy?
items.answer: Full refund if cancelled 14+ days before the tour. 50% refund for 7-13 days. No refund within 7 days. Weather contingencies always have alternatives.

items.question: What happens if it rains?
items.answer: Most activities continue in light rain. For safety during heavy storms, we'll take all necessary precautions and adjust the itinerary accordingly.

items.question: What about altitude sickness?
items.answer: We ascend gradually to allow acclimatization. Our guides monitor everyone closely. If symptoms occur, we can descend and rest.

items.question: How do I get to the meeting point?
items.answer: We provide pickup from any hotel in Lijiang Old Town area. Contact us to arrange an alternative meeting point if needed.

items.question: What's the accommodation like?
items.answer: You'll stay in family-run guesthouses in Wenhai and Runangu villages, experiencing authentic local hospitality. Rooms are simple but clean.

items.question: How does this trip support local communities?
items.answer: Each booking directly supports local Naxi and Yi communities through village homestays, local guides, and traditional meals. We contribute and are actively involved in local environmental protection and sustainability initiatives in the villages and nature reserves on this trail.

title.text: Ready to Join the Forever Walk?

seo.metaTitle: NatGeo's Forever Walk Tour | Yunnan Out of Eden Walk Experience
seo.metaDescription: Relive Paul Salopek's 'Out of Eden Walk' as documented in NatGeo's 'Forever Walk: China'. Walk Jade Dragon Snow Mountain trails in Yunnan, China, with a local guide. Small-group Yunnan eco tour.
